title: Carrot Rarity
description: Rare carrots to collect and cherish.
body:
![minecraft screenshot with 4 different types of carrot lying on the ground](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e11362166ac49c60582f1f2a379549897dd1ea84.png)
Make every harvest a thrill with 3 increasingly rare variant carrots! Can you pull them all?

This mod adjusts the carrot crop loot table so that each harvest has a chance to drop one variant carrot. They all function exactly like ordinary carrots, so there is no advantage beyond bragging rights. They vary in rarity from a 5% drop (Twisty Carrot) to a .024% drop (Carrot Baby).
